violations.text: Nonfood-contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The double doors to the outside, located in the big and small dining rooms, is not tight-fitting during time of inspection. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Observed wet knife drying in wall knife holder (top of knife holder had debris/dust on it). PIC moved all knifes and top of knife holder to 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Placed knives on rack to air dry. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The dining room with a small food prep and serving area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer have an accumulation of food debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
